product_name: DIGENE TAB ORANGE FLAVOUR 15 S
description: Product Details About Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S belongs to a group of medicines called antacids used to treat acidity, heartburn, indigestion, gastritis (inflammation of the stomach), and stomach upset. The stomach is usually protected from the acid by a mucous layer. In some cases, the mucous layer gets eroded due to excess acid production, which leads to complications like acidity and heartburn. Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S is a combination of four drugs: Aluminium hydroxide, Magnesium hydroxide, Magnesium silicate and Simethicone. Aluminium hydroxide,  magnesium hydroxide and magnesium silicate belong to a group of antacids. Aluminium hydroxide, magnesium hydroxide and magnesium silicate work by neutralising excess stomach acid. Simethicone is anti-flatulent which works by decreasing the surface tension of gas bubbles, thereby facilitating gas expulsion through flatus or belching (burping). Take Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S as prescribed by your doctor. You are advised to take Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S for as long as your doctor has prescribed it for you, depending on your medical condition. In some cases, you may experience certain common side effects, such as constipation, diarrhoea, dizziness, and drowsiness. Most of these side effects do not require medical attention and will resolve gradually over time. However, you are advised to talk to your doctor if you experience these side effects persistently. Let your doctor know if you are allergic to any of the contents. Do not take Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S if you are pregnant or breastfeeding unless prescribed by the doctor. Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S should not be given to children as safety have not been established. Avoid consuming alcohol along with Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S as it could lead to increased acidity. Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S may cause dizziness and drowsiness, do not drive or operate machinery unless you are alert. Inform your doctor regarding other prescription, non-prescription and herbal medicines you are taking to prevent any side effects/interactions. Uses of Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S Acidity, Heartburn, Indigestion, Gastritis (inflammation of the stomach), Stomach upset Medicinal Benefits Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S belongs to a group of medicines called antacids used to treat acidity, heartburn, indigestion, gastritis (inflammation of the stomach), and stomach upset. Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S is a combination of three drugs: Aluminium hydroxide (antacid), Magnesium hydroxide (antacid), Magnesium silicate (antacid), and Simethicone (anti-flatulent). Aluminium hydroxide, Magnesium hydroxide, and Magnesium silicate work by neutralising excess stomach acid. Simethicone works by lowering the surface tension of gas bubbles, thereby facilitating gas expulsion through flatus or belching (burping). It also prevents the accumulation and formation of gas in the digestive tract. Directions for Use Take Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S with or without food. Take the required dose/quantity of Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S using the measuring cup provided by the pack, shake the bottle well before each use. Depending on your medical condition, your doctor will decide how long you need to take Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S. Storage Store in a cool and dry place away from sunlight Flavour Orange Side Effects of Digene Tablets Acidity & Gas Relief Orange flavour 15`S Constipation Diarrhea Dizziness Drowsiness
